title: Enchantment Effects
body:
![Enchantment Effects (Title)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15dfac2d24c3be8f40278cfde42da05b66a42192.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/qgEiKVd3kSY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Because enchantments didn't feel special enough.

Enchantment Effects is a small client-side mod that makes enchantments feel more powerful by adding sounds and particle effects. After grinding out for max enchantments I realized my sword didn't _feel_ any more powerful, so this mod attempts to fix that!

## Sharpness
The Sharpness enchantment will now do a magic slash on the target! Slash size scales with enchantment level. 
<details>
<summary>Picture</summary>
  
![Enderman Hit With Sharpness](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pXo36Na4/images/f70ade2273485f42184cfcc3b7022490c921d3e9.png)

</details>


## Smite
The Smite enchantment now summons a holy beam of light! Beam size scales with enchantment level.
<details>
<summary>Picture</summary>
  
![Skeleton Getting Smited](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pXo36Na4/images/8732393003502bbfa811351d32c410282d04cf53.png)

</details>


## Bane of Arthropods
The Bane of Arthropods enchantment now banishes the bug into nonexistence! Banish size scales with enchantment level.
<details>
<summary>Picture</summary>
  
![Spider Being Banished](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pXo36Na4/images/2285b0a2f3d1fec7bbd462813efcf98a0db643b5.png)

</details>


## Fire Aspect
The fire aspect enchantment now ignites your target with a ring of fire! Number of rings increases with enchantment level.
<details>
<summary>Picture</summary>
  
![Cow Being Ignited](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pXo36Na4/images/4ad3ef9d5cc3d364761bfba3e31f1b170cd99f1c.png)

</details>


## Knockback
The Knockback enchantment now pushes back your target with a gust of wind! Number of gusts increases with enchantment level.
<details>
<summary>Picture</summary>

![Creeper Being Knocked Off Cliff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pXo36Na4/images/7d0e0a88793220a989748aa3890a4a50c7c5b858.png)

</details>


## Planned Features:
- Effects for Thorns
- Effects for bow enchantments
- Effects for trident enchantments
- Effects for mace enchantments
- Special enchantment synergies (eg. Smite + Fire Aspect = Fiery Smite)
